TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ca-li-man śü•ÁźÜśõľ == ni Ca-li-man u apuyuay ci Pi-pin nu sakakaay a wawaan, itida i pitu a lasubu enem a bataan idw ku walu a mihcaan ci Pi-pin nikapatayan milaylay tu wanwi. mahkalingatu, ci Ca-li-man atu sabanida ci Ka-luo-man yise mapulung mikuwan tu wankuo. ci Ka-luo-man yise itida i pitu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu a mihcaan bahal sa mapatay, mihapu ci Ca-li-man malaFa-lan-ke' wan-kuo a mikuwanay a tademaw. milaylay ci nida tu kawaw ni ama nida a pasayda i sikiwsama a sakay hekal atu kiwkay a sapidiputaw, papibahbahen nu heni ku Pa-pi-di tademaw patahekal tadan i Pai-yi-ta-li atu mililiday a tademaw midebung tu Mu-se-lin a Yi-pi-li subalan. midebung mi'dis tu walian a Sa-ke'-sun tademaw, pacicien nu heni pasayda i tensukiw, anu caay pikeda a patayen, milabu ci nida tu sapipatayaw tu Fai-e-ten a kiyaku. ci Ca-li-man itida i walu a lasubuan nu mihcaan a kulisimase miala tu nipabeli nu ciw-cun Len-sanse itida i Luo-ma-sen-puo-duo-lu taten patupelan u "Luo-ma tademaw a hunti", " sakalihalay a patidengay nu tademaw", tada i tungduh tu ku kinli nida. . nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ pilecuhan atu nikabalakiŚáļÁĒüŤąáśąźťē∑ Ca-li-man itida i picsip tu mihcaan sepat bulad tusa dimiad pilecuhan i Fa-lan-ke wan-kuo nu Ay-se-ta-le se siidaay nu luma'an. baki misamukunay Ca-li u Fa-lan-ke wan-kuo Muo-luo-wen wan-caw a kun-sing. Wama ci Pi-pin sanse midayday tu kun-sing, itida i sikiwsamaan a nipacuked tu sakalatapang, alesen ci Muo-luo-wen wan-caw sadikuday a kuo-wan Si-de-li sanse, ku midayliay, patideng tu Cia-luo-lin wan-caw. Ca-li milaylay satu dadaydayan atu sikiwsama mahida tu ku nikacabayan. . maalanida ku Pa-pi-di a wanwi ŚŹĖŚĺóŚÄęŚ∑īŚļēÁöĄÁéčšĹć Pi-pin itida i piclim wal mihcaan mapatay , ci Ca-li-man atu saba nida ci Ka-luo-man yise itida i cacay bataan a bulad siwa demiad makakenih midayday tu Fa-lan-ke-wan-kuo a Nu-wa-un atu Su-wa-sung tusaay a lala'an. picpic cay mihcaan caytu bulad sip dimiad, ci Ka-luo-man mapatay, Ca-li paSu-wa-sun pulung han nida mikuwan, Ka-luo-man a acawa ladayen nida ku wawa atu siidaay milaliw pasayda i Yi-ta-li, miida tu Lun-pa-di kuo-wan ci De-si-de-li-u-se a hitayan, Pa-wi-ya itida i picpic sip mihcaan nem bulad mahetik, Lun-pa-di kuo-wan ci De-si-de-li-u-se madakep, Ca-li maala nida ku Lun-pa-di a wan-wi, mahida u Lun-pa-di tademaw itida i Yi-ta-li a nikuwanan a hedek atu ci Ka-luo-man yise u liwan nu tademawan a malawpes mapatay. šłēŚĻ≥Śú®768 . wali Luo-ma-di-kuo a nidebunganśĚĪÁĺÖť¶¨ŚłĚŚúčÁöĄŚÖ•šĺĶ Ca-li atu ci Cun-se-tan-tin-paw a kanki itida i picwal pic mihcaan katukuh i picwal wal mihcaan malawpes, walia Luo-ma-di-kuo a hitay itida i picwal wal mihcaan katuud ku midebungay i Yi-ta-li timulan nu niyadu'an. Pa-fa-li-ya kuncei ci Tay-si-luo acawa, u nipahutin ni Ca-li a Lun-pa-di kuo-wan Di-si-de-li-wu-se a tataynaan a wawaan, mangalay micaliw tu acawa nida miwawies. ci Tay-si-luo misungaay ci A-wa-e tademaw pasayda ci Ca-li wawies, katukuh tu picwal pic mihcaan mapalekal ku kalepacawan. ci Ca-li amelik makata tu nikalepacawan, ci Pay-puo-cei midayli ci Tay-si-luo mikuwan tu Pa-fa-li-ya. walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat kapatayan ni Ca-li-man a O-cuo Ca-li-man a sakakaay nu wawa ci Ca-li itida i walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay nu mihcaan mapatay, sisa ci Ca-li-man itida i walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu mihcaan siwa a bulad itida i A-hen patupelan ci Lu-yi ese malahungti. ci Ca-li-man caay pakasiacawa tu wawa nida, mahicaay kiya ku katuuday miadih atu misasasimsimen. . wal cay sip mihcaan tu kasienawan, cu'de ku demiad tawya, malalid nu kanmaw ci Ca-li-wan. i cay bulad tuwal demiad, i tukay nu A-hen-kun mapatay, tawya nu mihcaan pictu mihcaan. ci Ca-li lima ku nikasiacawa nida. picnem nem mihcaan si acawa ci He-luo-te'-lu-de, idaw ku pilecuhan ci Pi-pin sese',mahiya nu cen-ce' atu kiwkay nu kanki sa palawpesen ku kakikungan. caay ka tenes namapatay, masasula'cus tu ku Di-kuo. walsip lu mihcaan, iluc nida masasiteked tu luma', ci nida tu ku malatahudasa, cacayay a Di-kuo malatulu. wali Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo malaayawan a sensen' -Luo-ma-ti-kuo, nu tipanay nu Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo malaayawan tu a Fa-lan-si wan-kuo, cun Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo sa kakenihan nu nutipanay atu walian nu Fa-lan-ke'. .
S.PHON: == ¶a-r~…ĺi-man *** == ni ¶a-r~…ĺi-man u apujuaj ¶i pi-pin nu sakakaaj a wawaan, itida i pitu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idw ku war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan ¶i pi-pin nikapatajan mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu wanwi. mańßkar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man atu sabanida ¶i ka-r~…ĺuo-man jis…ô mapur~…ĺuŇč mikuwan tu wankuo. ¶i ka-r~…ĺuo-man jis…ô itida i pitu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan bańßar~…ĺ sa mapataj, mińßapu ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man mar~…ĺafa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ ° wan-kuo a mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw. mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i nida tu kawaw ni ama nida a pasajda i sikiwsama a sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu kiwkaj a sapidiputaw, papibańßbańß…ôn nu ńß…ôni ku pa-pi-di tad…ômaw patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tadan i pai-ji-ta-r~…ĺi atu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw mid…ôbuŇč tu mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin a ji-pi-r~…ĺi subar~…ĺan. mid…ôbuŇč mi Ē~ °dis tu war~…ĺian a sa-k…ô Ē~ °-sun tad…ômaw, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn nu ńß…ôni pasajda i t…ônsukiw, anu ¶aaj pik…ôda a pataj…ôn, mir~…ĺabu ¶i nida tu sapipatajaw tu fai-…ô-t…ôn a kijaku. ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man itida i war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubuan nu mińß ¶aan a kur~…ĺisimas…ô miar~…ĺa tu nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu ¶iw- ¶un r~…ĺ…ôn-sans…ô itida i r~…ĺuo-ma-s…ôn-puo-duo-r~…ĺu tat…ôn patup…ôr~…ĺan u "r~…ĺuo-ma tad…ômaw a ńßunti", " sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a patid…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw", tada i tuŇčduńß tu ku kinr~…ĺi nida. . nikaudip** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu nikabar~…ĺaki***** ¶a-r~…ĺi-man itida i pi ¶sip tu mińß ¶aan s…ôpat bur~…ĺad tusa dimiad pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô wan-kuo nu aj-s…ô-ta-r~…ĺ…ô s…ô siidaaj nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an. baki misamukunaj ¶a-r~…ĺi u fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô wan-kuo muo-r~…ĺuo-w…ôn wan- ¶aw a kun-siŇč. wama ¶i pi-pin sans…ô midajdaj tu kun-siŇč, itida i sikiwsamaan a nipa ¶uk…ôd tu sakar~…ĺatapaŇč, ar~…ĺ…ôs…ôn ¶i muo-r~…ĺuo-w…ôn wan- ¶aw sadikudaj a kuo-wan si-d…ô-r~…ĺi sans…ô, ku midajr~…ĺiaj, patid…ôŇč tu ¶ia-r~…ĺuo-r~…ĺin wan- ¶aw. ¶a-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj satu dadajdajan atu sikiwsama mańßida tu ku nika ¶abajan. . maar~…ĺanida ku pa-pi-di a wanwi ******** pi-pin itida i pi ¶r~…ĺim war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan mapataj , ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man atu saba nida ¶i ka-r~…ĺuo-man jis…ô itida i ¶a ¶aj bataan a bur~…ĺad siwa d…ômiad makak…ônińß midajdaj tu fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô-wan-kuo a nu-wa-un atu su-wa-suŇč tusaaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °an. pi ¶pi ¶ ¶aj mińß ¶aan ¶ajtu bur~…ĺad sip dimiad, ¶i ka-r~…ĺuo-man mapataj, ¶a-r~…ĺi pasu-wa-sun pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan nida mikuwan, ka-r~…ĺuo-man a a ¶awa r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ku wawa atu siidaaj mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw pasajda i ji-ta-r~…ĺi, miida tu r~…ĺun-pa-di kuo-wan ¶i d…ô-si-d…ô-r~…ĺi-u-s…ô a ńßitajan, pa-wi-ja itida i pi ¶pi ¶ sip mińß ¶aan n…ôm bur~…ĺad mańß…ôtik, r~…ĺun-pa-di kuo-wan ¶i d…ô-si-d…ô-r~…ĺi-u-s…ô madak…ôp, ¶a-r~…ĺi maar~…ĺa nida ku r~…ĺun-pa-di a wan-wi, mańßida u r~…ĺun-pa-di tad…ômaw itida i ji-ta-r~…ĺi a nikuwanan a ńß…ôd…ôk atu ¶i ka-r~…ĺuo-man jis…ô u r~…ĺiwan nu tad…ômawan a mar~…ĺawp…ôs mapataj. ****** . war~…ĺi r~…ĺuo-ma-di-kuo a nid…ôbuŇčan******** ¶a-r~…ĺi atu ¶i ¶un-s…ô-tan-tin-paw a kanki itida i pi ¶war~…ĺ pi ¶ mińß ¶aan katukuńß i pi ¶war~…ĺ war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺawp…ôs, war~…ĺia r~…ĺuo-ma-di-kuo a ńßitaj itida i pi ¶war~…ĺ war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan katuud ku mid…ôbuŇčaj i ji-ta-r~…ĺi timur~…ĺan nu nijadu Ē~ °an. pa-fa-r~…ĺi-ja kun ¶…ôi ¶i taj-si-r~…ĺuo a ¶awa, u nipańßutin ni ¶a-r~…ĺi a r~…ĺun-pa-di kuo-wan di-si-d…ô-r~…ĺi-wu-s…ô a tatajnaan a wawaan, maŇčar~…ĺaj mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu a ¶awa nida miwawi…ôs. ¶i taj-si-r~…ĺuo misuŇčaaj ¶i a-wa-…ô tad…ômaw pasajda ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi wawi…ôs, katukuńß tu pi ¶war~…ĺ pi ¶ mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ku kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan. ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi am…ôr~…ĺik makata tu nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, ¶i paj-puo- ¶…ôi midajr~…ĺi ¶i taj-si-r~…ĺuo mikuwan tu pa-fa-r~…ĺi-ja. war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat kapatajan ni ¶a-r~…ĺi-man a o- ¶uo ¶a-r~…ĺi-man a sakakaaj nu wawa ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi itida i war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku ¶a ¶aj nu mińß ¶aan mapataj, sisa ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man itida i war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan siwa a bur~…ĺad itida i a-ńß…ôn patup…ôr~…ĺan ¶i r~…ĺu-ji …ôs…ô mar~…ĺańßuŇčti. ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man ¶aaj pakasia ¶awa tu wawa nida, mańßi ¶aaj kija ku katuudaj miadińß atu misasasimsim…ôn. . war~…ĺ ¶aj sip mińß ¶aan tu kasi…ônawan, ¶u Ē~ °d…ô ku d…ômiad tawja, mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu kanmaw ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-wan. i ¶aj bur~…ĺad tuwar~…ĺ d…ômiad, i tukaj nu a-ńß…ôn-kun mapataj, tawja nu mińß ¶aan pi ¶tu mińß ¶aan. ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi r~…ĺima ku nikasia ¶awa nida. pi ¶n…ôm n…ôm mińß ¶aan si a ¶awa ¶i ńß…ô-r~…ĺuo-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-d…ô, idaw ku pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan ¶i pi-pin s…ôs…ô Ē~ °,mańßija nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô Ē~ ° atu kiwkaj nu kanki sa par~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn ku kakikuŇčan. ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs namapataj, masasur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu ku di-kuo. war~…ĺsip r~…ĺu mińß ¶aan, ir~…ĺu ¶ nida masasit…ôk…ôd tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, ¶i nida tu ku mar~…ĺatańßudasa, ¶a ¶ajaj a di-kuo mar~…ĺatur~…ĺu. war~…ĺi fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ ° wan-kuo mar~…ĺaajawan a s…ôns…ôn Ē~ ° -r~…ĺuo-ma-ti-kuo, nu tipanaj nu fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ ° wan-kuo mar~…ĺaajawan tu a fa-r~…ĺan-si wan-kuo, ¶un fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ ° wan-kuo sa kak…ônińßan nu nutipanaj atu war~…ĺian nu fa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ °. .
S.FORM: == Ca-li-man śü•ÁźÜśõľ == ni Ca-li-man u apuyuay ci Pi-pin nu sakakaay a wawaan, itida i pitu a lasubu enem a bataan idw ku walu a mihcaan ci Pi-pin nikapatayan milaylay tu wanwi. mahkalingatu, ci Ca-li-man atu sabanida ci Ka-luo-man yise mapulung mikuwan tu wankuo. ci Ka-luo-man yise itida i pitu a lasubu enem a bataan idaw ku walu a mihcaan bahal sa mapatay, mihapu ci Ca-li-man malaFa-lan-ke' wan-kuo a mikuwanay a tademaw. milaylay ci nida tu kawaw ni ama nida a pasayda i sikiwsama a sakay hekal atu kiwkay a sapidiputaw, papibahbahen nu heni ku Pa-pi-di tademaw patahekal tadan i Pai-yi-ta-li atu mililiday a tademaw midebung tu Mu-se-lin a Yi-pi-li subalan. midebung mi'dis tu walian a Sa-ke'-sun tademaw, pacicien nu heni pasayda i tensukiw, anu caay pikeda a patayen, milabu ci nida tu sapipatayaw tu Fai-e-ten a kiyaku. ci Ca-li-man itida i walu a lasubuan nu mihcaan a kulisimase miala tu nipabeli nu ciw-cun Len-sanse itida i Luo-ma-sen-puo-duo-lu taten patupelan u "Luo-ma tademaw a hunti", " sakalihalay a patidengay nu tademaw", tada i tungduh tu ku kinli nida. . nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ pilecuhan atu nikabalakiŚáļÁĒüŤąáśąźťē∑ Ca-li-man itida i picsip tu mihcaan sepat bulad tusa dimiad pilecuhan i Fa-lan-ke wan-kuo nu Ay-se-ta-le se siidaay nu luma'an. baki misamukunay Ca-li u Fa-lan-ke wan-kuo Muo-luo-wen wan-caw a kun-sing. Wama ci Pi-pin sanse midayday tu kun-sing, itida i sikiwsamaan a nipacuked tu sakalatapang, alesen ci Muo-luo-wen wan-caw sadikuday a kuo-wan Si-de-li sanse, ku midayliay, patideng tu Cia-luo-lin wan-caw. Ca-li milaylay satu dadaydayan atu sikiwsama mahida tu ku nikacabayan. . maalanida ku Pa-pi-di a wanwi ŚŹĖŚĺóŚÄęŚ∑īŚļēÁöĄÁéčšĹć Pi-pin itida i piclim wal mihcaan mapatay , ci Ca-li-man atu saba nida ci Ka-luo-man yise itida i cacay bataan a bulad siwa demiad makakenih midayday tu Fa-lan-ke-wan-kuo a Nu-wa-un atu Su-wa-sung tusaay a lala'an. picpic cay mihcaan caytu bulad sip dimiad, ci Ka-luo-man mapatay, Ca-li paSu-wa-sun pulung han nida mikuwan, Ka-luo-man a acawa ladayen nida ku wawa atu siidaay milaliw pasayda i Yi-ta-li, miida tu Lun-pa-di kuo-wan ci De-si-de-li-u-se a hitayan, Pa-wi-ya itida i picpic sip mihcaan nem bulad mahetik, Lun-pa-di kuo-wan ci De-si-de-li-u-se madakep, Ca-li maala nida ku Lun-pa-di a wan-wi, mahida u Lun-pa-di tademaw itida i Yi-ta-li a nikuwanan a hedek atu ci Ka-luo-man yise u liwan nu tademawan a malawpes mapatay. šłēŚĻ≥Śú®768 . wali Luo-ma-di-kuo a nidebunganśĚĪÁĺÖť¶¨ŚłĚŚúčÁöĄŚÖ•šĺĶ Ca-li atu ci Cun-se-tan-tin-paw a kanki itida i picwal pic mihcaan katukuh i picwal wal mihcaan malawpes, walia Luo-ma-di-kuo a hitay itida i picwal wal mihcaan katuud ku midebungay i Yi-ta-li timulan nu niyadu'an. Pa-fa-li-ya kuncei ci Tay-si-luo acawa, u nipahutin ni Ca-li a Lun-pa-di kuo-wan Di-si-de-li-wu-se a tataynaan a wawaan, mangalay micaliw tu acawa nida miwawies. ci Tay-si-luo misungaay ci A-wa-e tademaw pasayda ci Ca-li wawies, katukuh tu picwal pic mihcaan mapalekal ku kalepacawan. ci Ca-li amelik makata tu nikalepacawan, ci Pay-puo-cei midayli ci Tay-si-luo mikuwan tu Pa-fa-li-ya. walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat kapatayan ni Ca-li-man a O-cuo Ca-li-man a sakakaay nu wawa ci Ca-li itida i walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku cacay nu mihcaan mapatay, sisa ci Ca-li-man itida i walu a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku tulu mihcaan siwa a bulad itida i A-hen patupelan ci Lu-yi ese malahungti. ci Ca-li-man caay pakasiacawa tu wawa nida, mahicaay kiya ku katuuday miadih atu misasasimsimen. . wal cay sip mihcaan tu kasienawan, cu'de ku demiad tawya, malalid nu kanmaw ci Ca-li-wan. i cay bulad tuwal demiad, i tukay nu A-hen-kun mapatay, tawya nu mihcaan pictu mihcaan. ci Ca-li lima ku nikasiacawa nida. picnem nem mihcaan si acawa ci He-luo-te'-lu-de, idaw ku pilecuhan ci Pi-pin sese',mahiya nu cen-ce' atu kiwkay nu kanki sa palawpesen ku kakikungan. caay ka tenes namapatay, masasula'cus tu ku Di-kuo. walsip lu mihcaan, iluc nida masasiteked tu luma', ci nida tu ku malatahudasa, cacayay a Di-kuo malatulu. wali Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo malaayawan a sensen' -Luo-ma-ti-kuo, nu tipanay nu Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo malaayawan tu a Fa-lan-si wan-kuo, cun Fa-lan-ke' wan-kuo sa kakenihan nu nutipanay atu walian nu Fa-lan-ke'. .

wanwi. mańßkar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man atu sabanida ¶i ka-r~…ĺuo-man jis…ô mapur~…ĺuŇč mikuwan tu wankuo. ¶i ka-r~…ĺuo-man jis…ô itida i pitu a r~…ĺasubu …ôn…ôm a bataan idaw ku war~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan bańßar~…ĺ sa mapataj, mińßapu ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man mar~…ĺafa-r~…ĺan-k…ô Ē~ ° wan-kuo a mikuwanaj a tad…ômaw. mir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj ¶i nida tu kawaw ni ama nida a pasajda i sikiwsama a sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu kiwkaj a sapidiputaw, papibańßbańß…ôn nu ńß…ôni ku pa-pi-di tad…ômaw patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tadan i pai-ji-ta-r~…ĺi atu mir~…ĺir~…ĺidaj a tad…ômaw mid…ôbuŇč tu mu-s…ô-r~…ĺin a ji-pi-r~…ĺi subar~…ĺan. mid…ôbuŇč mi Ē~ °dis tu war~…ĺian a sa-k…ô Ē~ °-sun tad…ômaw, pa ¶i ¶i…ôn nu ńß…ôni pasajda i t…ônsukiw, anu ¶aaj pik…ôda a pataj…ôn, mir~…ĺabu ¶i nida tu sapipatajaw tu fai-…ô-t…ôn a kijaku. ¶i ¶a-r~…ĺi-man itida i war~…ĺu a r~…ĺasubuan nu mińß ¶aan a kur~…ĺisimas…ô miar~…ĺa tu nipab…ôr~…ĺi nu ¶iw- ¶un r~…ĺ…ôn-sans…ô itida i r~…ĺuo-ma-s…ôn-puo-duo-r~…ĺu tat…ôn patup…ôr~…ĺan u "r~…ĺuo-ma tad…ômaw a ńßunti", " sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a patid…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômaw", tada i tuŇčduńß tu ku kinr~…ĺi nida. . nikaudip** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan atu nikabar~…ĺaki***** ¶a-r~…ĺi-man itida i pi ¶sip tu mińß ¶aan s…ôpat bur~…ĺad tusa a ¶awa, u nipańßutin ni ¶a-r~…ĺi a r~…ĺun-pa-di kuo-wan di-si-d…ô-r~…ĺi-wu-s…ô a tatajnaan a wawaan, maŇčar~…ĺaj mi ¶ar~…ĺiw tu a ¶awa nida miwawi…ôs. ¶i taj-si-r~…ĺuo misuŇčaaj ¶i a-wa-…ô tad…ômaw
